ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus where the course is offered */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the schedule belongs to */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the schedule entry */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topics or activities for the schedule entry */,
  "reading" TEXT /* Reading materials or preparation required */,
  "assignment_due" TEXT /* Assignment due date for the schedule entry */,
  "meeting_link" TEXT /* Link to the virtual meeting */,
  "meeting_password" TEXT /* Password to the virtual meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Submission status of the assignment (e.g., submitted, pending) */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points for the assignment */,
  "grading_criteria" TEXT /* Grading criteria for the assignment */,
  "file_submission" INTEGER /* Whether file submission is allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., professor, teaching assistant) */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program of the student (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Graduation year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "file" TEXT /* File submitted by the student */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance of the course */,
  "engagement" TEXT /* Engagement of the students in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reports_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
